description: The jjwt-orgjson module provides JJWT's org.json-based serializer and deserializer so JWT headers and claims can be read and written using JSON-Java. It is the recommended JSON backend for Android applications and supports simple object-to-JSON marshaling instead of POJO unmarshalling.

The jjwt-orgjson module provides JJWT's org.json-based serializer and deserializer so JWT claims and headers can be read and written using JSON-Java. It is the recommended JSON backend for Android applications and supports simple object-to-JSON marshaling rather than POJO unmarshalling.

The jjwt-orgjson module provides JJWT's org.json-based JSON serializer and deserializer implementation for processing JWT content at runtime. It is the recommended JSON backend for Android use cases and supports simple claim marshaling without POJO unmarshalling.
